Preparation of ARF is very simple and can be done by mothers at home. 30 PREPARATION OF AMYLASE RICH FOOD (ARF) How to feed a young infant? What are the hygienic practices to be adopted? Take 250 g of wheat Add 2-3 volumes of water soak it for 8 hrs Drain excess water Germinate wheat in dark for 24-48 hours Sun dry for 5-8 hours Roast gently in flat pan just to remove water Grind and powder the grains (ARF) Store in airtight bottles/jars Add 5 g (one tea spoon) of ARF, after cooking, to every feed Infants cannot eat large quantities of food in one sitting at a given time. So, they should be fed small quantities at frequent intervals (3-4 times
